description_long: This is a rounded ceramic cup with a wide opening and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The exterior surface is adorned with a swirling, abstract pattern in shades of blue, orange, and teal, giving it a vibrant and modern appearance. The rim and interior of the cup are a clean, solid white, providing a striking contrast to the colorful exterior. The handle is smoothly integrated and ergonomically shaped for comfortable gripping. On one side, there is a bold, stylized logo or text reading 'XS DESIGNS' in white, standing out against the dark patterned background. The cup's overall form is bulbous and inviting, suitable for serving hot beverages in an urban café or home kitchen.
description: A bulbous ceramic cup with a white interior, vibrant swirling blue and orange exterior, and a single ergonomic handle. Features a bold 'XS DESIGNS' logo on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the 'XS DESIGNS' logo prominently displayed on the patterned surface.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, no logo visible, highlighting the swirling abstract pattern.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the continuous decorative pattern and no visible logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side of the logo, focusing on the uninterrupted abstract pattern and the cup's rounded shape.
